# @agentlens-sdk/sdk (TypeScript)

> TypeScript/Node.js SDK for AgentLens — real-time observability for AI agents.

## Install

```bash
npm install @agentlens-sdk/sdk
npm install @agentlens-sdk/sdk openai             # with OpenAI
npm install @agentlens-sdk/sdk @anthropic-ai/sdk  # with Anthropic
```

## Public API

```typescript
import {
  init,            // connect to AgentLens server
  trace,           // wrap a function for tracing
  autoInstrument,  // patch OpenAI + Anthropic automatically
  shutdown,        // flush and close connection
  SpanContext,     // class for manual span management
} from '@agentlens-sdk/sdk';
```

## Usage Patterns

### Auto-instrument (recommended)

```typescript
import { autoInstrument } from '@agentlens-sdk/sdk';
await autoInstrument();  // patches OpenAI + Anthropic — no other changes needed

import OpenAI from 'openai';
const openai = new OpenAI();
// All completions.create() calls are now traced automatically
```

### trace() wrapper

```typescript
import { init, trace } from '@agentlens-sdk/sdk';

await init({ serverUrl: 'ws://localhost:8766/ws', agentName: 'my-agent' });

const myAgent = trace(
  async (query: string) => {
    const result = await callLLM(query);
    return result;
  },
  { name: 'my_agent', eventType: 'llm_call' }
);

const answer = await myAgent('What is the capital of France?');
```

### Manual spans (SpanContext)

```typescript
import { SpanContext } from '@agentlens-sdk/sdk';

const span = new SpanContext({ name: 'tool_call', eventType: 'tool_call' });
span.setInput({ query });
const result = await runTool(query);
span.setOutput(result);
await span.end();
```

## init() Options

```typescript
await init({
  serverUrl: 'ws://localhost:8766/ws',  // WebSocket URL
  httpUrl: 'http://localhost:8766',     // HTTP URL
  agentName: 'my-agent',               // shown in dashboard
  sessionId: '01JKXXX...',             // override auto-generated ULID
});
```

## Design Guarantees

- **Never throws** — all SDK operations are wrapped in try/catch.
- **Non-blocking** — buffered async sends.
- **Graceful degradation** — if server is unreachable, events are silently dropped.
- **Auto session** — ULID session ID created on `init()` if not provided.

## Key Source Files

- [src/index.ts](src/index.ts) — public API: `init`, `autoInstrument`, `shutdown`
- [src/trace.ts](src/trace.ts) — `trace()` wrapper, `SpanContext` class
- [src/client.ts](src/client.ts) — WebSocket client, queue, reconnect
- [src/config.ts](src/config.ts) — `AgentLensConfig` interface
- [src/types.ts](src/types.ts) — `TraceEventData`, `InitOptions`, `EventType`, `EventStatus`
- [src/interceptors/openai.ts](src/interceptors/openai.ts) — OpenAI patch
- [src/interceptors/anthropic.ts](src/interceptors/anthropic.ts) — Anthropic patch
- [src/interceptors/generic.ts](src/interceptors/generic.ts) — generic function wrapper

## Trace Event Shape (TypeScript)

```typescript
interface TraceEventData {
  session_id: string;       // ULID
  event_type: EventType;    // 'llm_call' | 'tool_call' | 'decision' | 'memory_read' | 'memory_write' | 'user_input' | 'error'
  event_name: string;
  timestamp: string;        // ISO 8601 UTC
  duration_ms: number;
  model?: string;
  tokens_input: number;
  tokens_output: number;
  cost_usd?: number;        // auto-calculated server-side if omitted
  input_data?: unknown;
  output_data?: unknown;
  status: EventStatus;      // 'success' | 'error'
  error_message?: string;
  parent_event_id?: string; // ULID of parent span
  metadata?: Record<string, unknown>;
}
```

## npm

`@agentlens-sdk/sdk` — https://www.npmjs.com/package/@agentlens-sdk/sdk
